title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
summary: Victor Savkin argues that current coding agents lack sufficient context and memory between interactions, reducing their practical value despite individual capability. He uses the analogy of a genius with amnesia to illustrate how limited scope and state loss prevent agents from delivering real value on substantial codebases.
